items.title: Ashby BART East Lot Transit Oriented Development Request for Proposal
Review and provide feedback on the Request for Proposal (RFP) Framework and
Adopt a Resolution authorizing the City Manager, or designee, to expend Housing
items.action: 18 speakers. Presentation made and discussion held. M/S/C (Bartlett/Kesarwani) to adopt Resolution No. 71,984–N.S. Vote: All Ayes. Adjournment Action: M/S/C (Blackaby/Humbert) to adjourn the meeting. Vote: All Ayes.
